entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "Tengeneza flashcards za jiografia"

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "Tengeneza flashcards kwa ajili ya mitosis"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "Badilisha dokezo hili kuwa Maswali na Majibu"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Flashcard Builder on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Mwongozo wa vitendo wa kutumia Flashcard Builder kwenye inspir kwa kujifunza mazoezi, ukiwa na vidokezo, mizunguko ya masomo, na tabia salama zaidi za AI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Mzunguko imara zaidi wa kusoma

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn notes or topics into clear flashcards with answers, traps, and review prompts.
entries.value: Kijenga Flashcards cha AI kwa Kukumbuka kwa Bidii ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: geuza noti au mada kuwa flashcards zilizo wazi zenye majibu, mitego, na vidokezo vya marudio.

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: practical guide
entries.value: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza badala ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iombe AI ikague mantiki yako, si matokeo tu.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Kadi huuliza jambo moja kwa wakati mmoja na kujumuisha mitego ili marudio yajenge uelewa, si utambuzi tu.

entries.source: Create recall cards.
entries.value: Tengeneza kadi za kukumbuka.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Malizia kwa kuandika wazo tena kutoka kumbukumbu.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Mjenzi wa Flashcard

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Zoezi

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Vidokezo vya kujaribu

entries.source: Reveal answers when ready.
entries.value: Fichua majibu ukiwa tayari.

entries.source: Review misses sooner.
entries.value: Rudia makosa mapema zaidi.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Flashcard Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Memory Palace. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Anza hali ya moja kwa moja kwenye Flashcard Builder. Ikiwa unataka muundo wa kujifunza unaokaribiana, jaribu Memory Palace. Kwa mtazamo mpana zaidi wa jukwaa, soma kile ambacho mwenzi wa kujifunza wa AI anapaswa kufanya kwa kila mtu.

entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaojiandaa kwa mitihani, wanaojifunza lugha, na yeyote anayetumia mazoezi ya kukumbuka.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Iambie hali unachojaribu kujifunza au kutengeneza.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Tofauti hiyo huonekana katika mtiririko. Badala ya jibu moja kubwa, vipindi bora hupitia mzunguko: weka lengo, jaribu kitu, pata mrejesho, rekebisha sehemu dhaifu, na chagua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Mkazo huo ni muhimu. Chatbot ya jumla inaweza kujibu karibu chochote, lakini hali ya kujifunza huipa mazungumzo umbo. Hukuelekeza kwenye aina ya kufikiri, mazoezi, mrejesho, au uchunguzi unaosaidia wazo kushikamana.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hii ndiyo tabia ile ile iliyo nyuma ya kusoma kwa AI bila kujidanganya: mfanye mwanafunzi abaki hai. AI ina manufaa zaidi inapokupa mrejesho kuhusu kufikiri kwako.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hali hii ina manufaa hasa kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Jaribu hatua kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Tumia Flashcard Builder unapotaka kipindi kinachoanza haraka lakini bado kinajirekebisha kulingana nawe. Lengo la kwanza si kusikika wa kuvutia. Lengo la kwanza ni kufanya hatua inayofuata ihisi inawezekana.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hali hii husaidia nini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Pa kwenda baadaye

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Unaweza pia kuanza na toleo lisilo kamili la tatizo lako halisi. Kidokezo cha kwanza kisicho safi ni sawa. Kipindi kinaweza kufafanua kiwango, hadhira, muda wa mwisho, na mtindo mara tu unapoanza.
